name: Retrospective
description: Team retrospective template for reflecting on what went well, what didn't, and improvements.

sections.title: What Went Well
sections.instruction: Celebrate wins and things that worked effectively.

sections.title: What Could Be Improved
sections.instruction: Identify challenges and areas for improvement without blame.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: Concrete improvements to implement, with owners.

sections.title: Team Health Check
sections.instruction: Quick pulse on team morale, workload, and blockers (1-5 scale).
